creator: beat@chruetertee.ch
text:
unbreak dotter: distfile is still fetchable

How-To-Repeat: 	# date
	So 27 Jan 2008 12:06:33 CET
	# cd /usr/ports/biology/dotter
	# make fetch
	=> dotter.LIN doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/dotter-20021204.
	=> Attempting to fetch from ftp://ftp.cgb.ki.se/pub/esr/dotter/.
	dotter.LIN                                    100% of 4691 kB  366 kBps 00m00s
	# make checksum
	=> MD5 Checksum OK for dotter-20021204/dotter.LIN.
	=> SHA256 Checksum OK for dotter-20021204/dotter.LIN.
